heading: Entitlement of officers discharged under this chapter to separation pay
label: 14517 Entitlement of officers discharged under this chapter to separation pay
text: An officer who is discharged under section 14513, 14514, or 14515 of this title is entitled to separation pay under if otherwise eligible under that section.section 1174 of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1996section 1691(b)(1) of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
